componentInstanceProperties.name: threshold1Label
componentInstanceProperties.value: This customer is highly active and engaged with your brand. Low risk for attrition.

componentInstanceProperties.name: threshold2Label
componentInstanceProperties.value: This customer is less active or engaged with your brand. Some risk for attrition.

componentInstanceProperties.name: threshold3Label
componentInstanceProperties.value: This customer is not active or engaged with your brand. Likely risk of attrition.
